pattern: On a permutation of 0..n-1 a chunk can close exactly when the running maximum of a prefix equals that prefix's last index.
hints: A prefix can form a complete chunk only if it contains precisely the values that belong in those positions after sorting.
Because the array is a permutation of 0..n-1, the prefix [0..i] is self-contained when its maximum equals i.
Sweep left to right tracking the running maximum; every time that maximum equals the current index, increment a chunk counter.

edge_inputs.description: fully reversed forces a single chunk
one local swap still allows many chunks
large value up front delays every closure
interleaved swaps yield intermediate chunk count

stress.description: random permutations of 0..n-1 within the small length cap
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, 10)
    nums = list(range(n))
    rng.shuffle(nums)
    return [nums]
stress.note: guaranteed permutation so the prefix-max identity holds
